creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #1)
Hello Palle,

I'm totally agree that we should upgrade this port to the latest stable and recommended for production version that is 1.3.3.
The patch that I've proposed a month ago was meant to be used due to the missing gem dependencies for 1.3.3 in FreeBSD ports tree.
Since you've committed this additional ports IMHO there are no reasons to stick with 0.12.x branch.
As a side-note I can propose that one can create sysutils/rubygem-fluentd012 port with an "old stable" version if someone still need it. And deprecate it when upstream ends it's support.

As for me, I would prefer to upgrade to 1.3.3 than to stay on 0.12.43.
